name: Super Chicken Sandwiches with Skinny Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 475 degrees.
2. Coat rimmed baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Place potato wedges on pan cut sides down and coat with additional cooking spray. Sprinkle lightly with garlic salt.
4. Bake 18 minutes. Turn potatoes; coat with more cooking spray and sprinkle with additional garlic salt. Bake 12 more minutes until potatoes are crisp and golden brown.
5. Coat a 12-inch nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Heat skillet over medium heat; add chicken and cook about 7 minutes on each side until juices run clear when chicken is pierced.
6. To make sauce: In bowl mix ketchup and mustard; set aside.
7. Remove chicken from skillet; cut each breast into 1/2-inch slices.
8. For each sandwich, spread 2 toast slices on one side with 1 tablespoon sauce each.
9. Sandwich 1 lettuce leaf, 2 tomato slices and 1 sliced chicken breast between toast slices.
10. Serve with potatoes and remaining sauce for dipping.
